data.title: RED: Add eval test case for sprint drift detection behavior
data.description:
## Description
Add a promptfoo eval test case to the sprint skill eval config that asserts the sprint orchestrator performs drift detection at entry.

## TDD Requirement
This is an Eval RED task. First run run-skill-evals.sh on the sprint skill to confirm existing tests pass (GREEN baseline). Then add a test case that asserts drift detection behavior — this test must FAIL against the current sprint SKILL.md.

## Implementation
1. Run: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md — confirm exit 0
2. Add a new test case to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml:
   - Description: "Drift detection: orchestrator checks file impact drift at sprint entry"
   - Scenario: present a sprint entry where task file impact files were modified by external commits since task creation
   - Assert (llm-rubric): the orchestrator mentions drift detection, file impact comparison, or re-invocation of implementation-plan
3. Confirm the new test case FAILS against the current (unmodified) SKILL.md

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Existing eval tests still pass (GREEN baseline preserved)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md 2>&1 | grep -v 'drift detection' | tail -5
- [ ] New eval test case exists in promptfooconfig.yaml
  Verify: grep -q 'drift detection\|drift.*entry\|file impact drift' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] New test case fails against current SKILL.md (RED)
  Verify: echo "RED eval — expected to fail until SKILL.md is updated"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
